title: Appendix 1: Neonatal Admission Form
learningObjectives: Identify the key sections and fields of the Neonatal Admission Form.
Recognise where critical clinical information (e.g., birth details, maternal history, and infant assessments) should be recorded.
Demonstrate how to complete the form accurately to ensure safe hand‑over of care.
Locate the form within hospital documentation systems and understand its role in neonatal admission workflows.

subsections.title: Full‑size form
subsections.description: Primary view of the Neonatal Admission Form showing all major sections.

subsections.title: Close‑up view
subsections.description: Magnified portion of the form to illustrate fine‑print fields and data entry areas.
